The Habits Master Class

Lesson 24: How to Set Off a Chain-Reaction of Small Wins



What do you do on your best days? Are there any commonalities? Come up with a few ideas for keystone habits that seem to ripple through and positively impact multiple areas of your life.



Spend a few minutes journaling below.
